---
title: "add_microbiome_as_bd"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, dbplyr, here, janitor, lubridate, rio, RPostgres, stringr, DBI, parsedate, uuid, hms, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr)
dbcon = hopToDB("wibbitr")
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
```

# pull samples
```{r}
soi = db_sample %>%
  filter(grepl("BRMic\\d{3}", sample_name)) %>%
  collect() %>%
  mutate(samp_num = as.integer(gsub("BRMic", "", sample_name))) %>%
  filter(samp_num >= 81,
         samp_num <= 160) %>%
  arrange(sample_name) %>%
  mutate(sample_type = "bd",
         uuid_name = paste0(sample_name, sample_type),
         sample_id = ifelse(is.na(sample_id), UUIDfromName("1208e62f-d3a1-462c-984f-0bf1f43f5837", uuid_name), sample_id))
```

# add to db sample table
```{r}
soi_insert = soi %>%
  select(any_of(colnames(db_sample)))

db_sample = db_rows_upsert(dbcon, db_sample, soi_insert, by="sample_id")

```
